Video.summary: Tony digs out a rare Mustang that's been hidden under dusty boxes for decades, but the owner has another surprise in store. Then Tony gets a chance to size up a Model A truck at an auction preview before he heads to the famous Spring Carlisle.
Video.title: Unboxing a Mustang

Video.summary: A Hurst Oldsmobile emerges from years in storage and roars back to life in the shop.
Video.title: Love Hurst

Video.summary: Tony helps prep a quirky, rare British TVR for sale and makes a play for one of the most elusive Camaros ever built, the legendary ZL1. When Tony is offered a rust-free '55 Chevy he knows it's too good of a deal to pass up.
Video.title: Oddballs and Icons

Video.summary: When a client puts out the call for a DeLorean, Tony finds two dramatically different contenders: one showroom-clean, the other frozen in time. It's nostalgia versus perfection as Tony helps figure out what's the best route for his client to take.
Video.title: A Tale of Two DeLoreans

Video.summary: Stacey rolls in a well-worn '59 Chevy Apache pickup and shows how to approach a project.
Video.title: Old Truck, Old Frame, New Game

Image.alt: Old Truck, Old Frame, New Game
Old Truck, Old Frame, New Game
Old Truck, Old Frame, New Game

Video.summary: Stacey digs into building a brand-new bed for the '59 Apache right beside the old one!
Video.title: Making the Bed on a Classic Truck

Image.alt: Making the Bed on a Classic Truck
Making the Bed on a Classic Truck
Making the Bed on a Classic Truck

Video.summary: Stacey goes out on the rails to take a look at the restoration of the 576 Steam Locomotive.
Video.title: Long Train Running

Video.summary: The Thiokol Swamp Spryte is back in the shop for some much needed restoration.
Video.title: Swamp Spryte: Making Tracks

Video.summary: Stacey shows what it takes to make a high-end replica of a down-and-dirty car.
Video.title: The Dirt Bird

Video.summary: Stacey demonstrates how to change a four-headlight classic Chevy truck.
Video.title: The Face Off

Video.summary: Stacey shows how to replace an old automatic transmission with a quick-shifting Tremec T5 5-speed.
Video.title: Mustang Transmission Swap

Video.summary: Stacey looks at a new twist on tool storage and sets up a Jeep Gladiator.
Video.title: Show Truck With a Diesel Twist and Capping a Gladiator

Image.alt: Show Truck With a Diesel Twist and Capping a Gladiator
Show Truck With a Diesel Twist and Capping a Gladiator
Show Truck With a Diesel Twist and Capping a Gladiator

Video.summary: The Stunt Double is back in the shop for its reveal and payoff.
Video.title: The Stunt Double Final Reveal

Video.summary: Stacey rolls in one of the show cars of the 1970s, the Mod Rod.
Video.title: The Mod Rod, Stripping and Prepping a Cab

Image.alt: The Mod Rod, Stripping and Prepping a Cab
The Mod Rod, Stripping and Prepping a Cab
The Mod Rod, Stripping and Prepping a Cab

Video.summary: Stacey shows the challenges of taking a new frame and components and fitting it to a vintage body.
Video.title: Prepping for surgery; the Level 4 project.

Image.alt: Prepping for surgery; the Level 4 project.
Prepping for surgery; the Level 4 project.
Prepping for surgery; the Level 4 project.

Video.summary: Stacey continues to fit the old '40 Chevy body on the new replacement frame.
Video.title: The Hot Rod Coupe: Fitting Body and Sheet Metal - Mighty Mite

Image.alt: The Hot Rod Coupe: Fitting Body and Sheet Metal - Mighty Mite
The Hot Rod Coupe: Fitting Body and Sheet Metal - Mighty Mite
The Hot Rod Coupe: Fitting Body and Sheet Metal - Mighty Mite

Video.summary: Stacey kicks it up a notch and moves on to a level two restoration on an old Jeepster.
Video.title: Jeepster: Moving on up to a level 2 Restoration

Image.alt: Jeepster: Moving on up to a level 2 Restoration
Jeepster: Moving on up to a level 2 Restoration
Jeepster: Moving on up to a level 2 Restoration

Video.summary: Stacey shows how to assess the condition of the paint and body on a project.
Video.title: The Shining

Video.summary: Stacey manages to find a Thiokol Swamp Spryte, a rare vehicle, and rolls it into the shop.
Video.title: Sasquatch or Swamp Sprite

Video.summary: Painless Performance, one of the influential companies in the automotive aftermarket.
Video.title: The Painless Wiring Way

Video.summary: Stacey takes a look at the supercar, McLaren M6GT; the originals are collectors' items.
Video.title: The McLaren M6GT Story and Building Your Own Replica

Image.alt: The McLaren M6GT Story and Building Your Own Replica
The McLaren M6GT Story and Building Your Own Replica
The McLaren M6GT Story and Building Your Own Replica

Video.summary: Stacey rolls in a 1970s Datsun 240Z and digs into the history of these cars.
Video.title: The Datsun 240Z -- A Sports Car for the Masses

Image.alt: The Datsun 240Z -- A Sports Car for the Masses
The Datsun 240Z -- A Sports Car for the Masses
The Datsun 240Z -- A Sports Car for the Masses

Video.summary: Stacey rolls the 24Oz onto the lift to lay out new brakes and suspension, adding a few components.
Video.title: Datsun 240Z Suspension and Super Pull of the South

Image.alt: Datsun 240Z Suspension and Super Pull of the South
Datsun 240Z Suspension and Super Pull of the South
Datsun 240Z Suspension and Super Pull of the South

Video.summary: The M6GT replica is back in the shop and it gets serious as Stacey stuffs a 600+ HP Kaase engine.
Video.title: McLaren Mid-Engine Madness and a Bundle of Snakes

Image.alt: McLaren Mid-Engine Madness and a Bundle of Snakes
McLaren Mid-Engine Madness and a Bundle of Snakes
McLaren Mid-Engine Madness and a Bundle of Snakes

Video.summary: Showing people how to take the ultimate picture of their project.
Video.title: Getting the perfect project picture and making your stereo KICK!

Image.alt: Getting the perfect project picture and making your stereo KICK!
Getting the perfect project picture and making your stereo KICK!
Getting the perfect project picture and making your stereo KICK!

Video.summary: Stacey tackles the tired old engine and transmission of the 1999 Dodge Li'l Red Wagon truck.
Video.title: The Li'l Red Wagon; Can You Hemi?

Image.alt: The Li'l Red Wagon; Can You Hemi?
The Li'l Red Wagon; Can You Hemi?
The Li'l Red Wagon; Can You Hemi?

Video.summary: Stacey David can design, fabricate and put it together while helping you learn to do it yourself.
Video.title: Stacey David's GearZ

Video.summary: Stacey and crew take everyone to one of the most amazing drag racing events in the country.
Video.title: Night Under Fire - Getting by With a Little Help From Your Friends

Image.alt: Night Under Fire - Getting by With a Little Help From Your Friends
Night Under Fire - Getting by With a Little Help From Your Friends
Night Under Fire - Getting by With a Little Help From Your Friends

Video.summary: Tony helps an owner move a custom Mercury to none other than Joe Zolper as a potential buyer. Then, a lead sends Tony to a dusty garage hiding a nearly untouched Porsche RS America with just 5,000 original miles.
Video.title: Hot Rods and Porsches

Video.summary: Tony teams up with the Auto Archeologist, Ryan Brutt, to uncover one of the rarest Dodge Demons in existence. Then Tony follows the trail to make an offer on a movie-star, an Eleanor Mustang. With this deal, the sky's the limit!
Video.title: Mopar to Midair
